## initializeConfig() function

InitializeConfig creates and initializes the global config singleton This should be called early in plugin startup

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function initializeConfig(
  profileName?: string,
  apiKey?: string,
  configFile?: string,
  deviceName?: string,
  logLevel?: string,
  color?: string,
): Config
```
